---
title: "Carolina Maria Oletto"
image: img/me.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/KarimOletto
    - text: "<img src='img/research.png' style='height:1em; margin-right:0.3em;'> ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Carolina-Oletto?ev=hdr_xprf
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/carolina-maria-oletto-bba5981b2/ 
    - icon: flower3
      text: OSF
      href: https://osf.io/vqybe/
markdown:
  extensions: [link_attributes]
engine: knitr
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I am a **postdoctoral** researcher at the Faculty of Health Sciences, **University of Southern Denmark**, Odense, Denmark.

My research interests include **visual perception** in the periphery of the visual field, in both general and clinical populations.

In my free time, I count kernel panics and reinstall operating systems—often in that order.
:::
